title: NULL handling for indexes on expressions
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(b INTEGER, c TEXT, d DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO t2 VALUES(NULL, 'test', 3.14), (2, NULL, 2.71), (NULL, NULL, NULL);
SELECT '1:', typeof(b), b FROM t2 WHERE b < 3;
SELECT '2:', typeof(c), c FROM t2 WHERE c IS NULL;
key_bug_features: NULL handling for indexed expressions in SELECT statements
